chain_of_thought: The earnings call highlighted Wipro's focus on AI-driven environmental solutions, leadership development, and client satisfaction. Governance practices were evident in transparency and strategic planning. Environmental disclosures were less detailed compared to social and governance aspects.

weaknesses: Uncertainty in macroeconomic conditions affecting governance
